content.title: Can the ‘Magnificent Seven’ save a stock market that might be doomed without them?
content.summary: Apple, Amazon, Nvidia and peers are quietly coming back to life, and that could easily jolt this sleepy stock market back into gear.

content.title: ‘I am at a loss’: My brother is dying. We are not close. What responsibility do I have to help him?
content.summary: “He is now no longer able to think clearly or communicate his wishes.”

content.title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
content.summary: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

content.title: ‘Respect is important’: If my financial adviser said, ‘Hey,’ my wife and I would walk out. Where do you draw the line?
content.summary: “I met with a financial representative who was not aware that AT&T was the shortened form of American Telephone and Telegraph.”

content.title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?
content.summary: “I’ve just been ignoring their attempts.”
